message:
test(e2e): Refactor end-to-end tests for improved readability and test_guard logging

Comprehensive refactoring of the true_e2e test suite to improve
maintainability and debugging capabilities:

artifact_tests.rs:
- Restructure test organization for clearer artifact lifecycle coverage
- Add test_guard logging for tracing test execution phases
- Reduce code duplication with shared setup helpers
- Improve assertion messages for debugging failures

c_cpp_compiler_tests.rs:
- Consolidate C and C++ compiler tests into unified module
- Add coverage for edge cases (missing includes, linker errors)
- Improve timeout handling for slow compilation tests
- Add test_guard instrumentation

cargo_bench_tests.rs:
- Refactor benchmark test structure
- Add test_guard for benchmark execution tracing
- Improve criterion integration testing
- Better handling of benchmark output parsing

cargo_nextest_tests.rs:
- Update test harness for nextest compatibility
- Add test filtering verification

exit_code_tests.rs:
- Comprehensive exit code verification across error scenarios
- Add test_guard logging for exit code flow tracing
- Cover signal handling and abnormal termination cases
- Test daemon communication failure modes

The test_guard logging enables better debugging of test failures by
recording test phases to structured logs under target/test-logs/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
